user.title: Rain Radar – location mode
user.description: How should Rain Radar determine the position to monitor?

fixed.title: Rain Radar – fixed position
fixed.description: Enter the coordinates of the point to monitor.

data_description.radius: Radius in kilometres around the position to scan for precipitation (1–500).
data_description.min_intensity: Only report rain when reflectivity exceeds this value. 10 dBZ ≈ drizzle, 30 dBZ ≈ moderate rain.

tracker.title: Rain Radar – device tracker
tracker.description: Select the device tracker whose live location will be monitored.

data_description.device_tracker: The tracker must have GPS attributes (latitude/longitude).
data_description.radius: Radius in kilometres around the tracked device to scan for precipitation (1–500).
data_description.min_intensity: Only report rain when reflectivity exceeds this value. 10 dBZ ≈ drizzle, 30 dBZ ≈ moderate rain.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the RainViewer API. Check your internet connection.
error.no_radar_data: The RainViewer API returned no radar frames.
error.tracker_unavailable: The selected device tracker is unavailable. Make sure the device is online.
error.tracker_no_gps: The selected device tracker has no GPS coordinates. Enable location sharing on the device.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: A Rain Radar entry for this location is already configured.
